summary: Applied the public-edge Grafana hardening so unauthenticated dashboard URLs stay on the login path, `/api/health` returns 404, and the hostname is marked noindex.

verification.observed: `curl -I https://grafana.lv3.org/login` returned `HTTP/2 200` with `x-robots-tag: noindex` and without `X-Grafana-Version` or `Via` headers.

notes: The full `make configure-edge-publication` path spent several minutes in `Publish generated static site directories` even when the published site artifacts were already current.

The final config render, validation, and NGINX reload for this rollout were completed through `playbooks/public-edge.yml --start-at-task 'Check whether the public edge certificate exists'` so the Grafana edge rules landed without republishing unchanged static directories.
